text:

Use su --help for help

robert has logged on ttyp1 from :0.0.
robert has logged on ttyp2 from :0.0.
robert has logged on ttyp3 from :0.0.
robert has logged on ttyp4 from :0.0.
sleipnir:/home/robert# ls
./                      .xsession*              csh.login
../                     .xsession-errors        csh.logout
.kde/                   Desktop/                snes/
.kderc                  Mail/                   test/
.snes96_snapshots/      bin/                    thomas/
.ssh/                   csh.cshrc
sleipnir:/home/robert# exit
sleipnir:/home/robert#

No time, sorry :).
How-To-Repeat: 
well, the above really.  It seems wrong. :) instead of giving help, it
su's.
